name: TMS Month Wise
query:
SELECT 
    DC.Customer AS "Customer:Link/Customer",
    DC.customer_name AS "Customer Name:Data:200",
    DC.customer_group AS "Customer Group:Data:200",
    DCI.item_code AS "Item Code",
    DCI.description AS "Description",
    
    
    (SELECT SUM(DI.qty) 
     FROM `tabDelivery Note` DN
     INNER JOIN `tabDelivery Note Item` DI ON DN.name = DI.parent
     WHERE DN.docstatus = 1 
       AND DI.item_code = DCI.item_code
       AND MONTH(DN.posting_date) = 1
       AND DN.customer = DC.customer
       AND DN.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
     GROUP BY DI.item_code) AS "January",
    
    
    (SELECT SUM(DI.qty) 
     FROM `tabDelivery Note` DN
     INNER JOIN `tabDelivery Note Item` DI ON DN.name = DI.parent
     WHERE DN.docstatus = 1 
       AND DI.item_code = DCI.item_code
       AND MONTH(DN.posting_date) = 2
       AND DN.customer = DC.customer
       AND DN.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
     GROUP BY DI.item_code) AS "February",

    
    (SELECT SUM(DI.qty) 
     FROM `tabDelivery Note` DN
     INNER JOIN `tabDelivery Note Item` DI ON DN.name = DI.parent
     WHERE DN.docstatus = 1 
       AND DI.item_code = DCI.item_code
       AND MONTH(DN.posting_date) = 3
       AND DN.customer = DC.customer
       AND DN.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
     GROUP BY DI.item_code) AS "March",

    
    (SELECT SUM(DI.qty) 
     FROM `tabDelivery Note` DN
     INNER JOIN `tabDelivery Note Item` DI ON DN.name = DI.parent
     WHERE DN.docstatus = 1 
       AND DI.item_code = DCI.item_code
       AND MONTH(DN.posting_date) = 4
       AND DN.customer = DC.customer
       AND DN.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
     GROUP BY DI.item_code) AS "April",
    
    
    (SELECT SUM(DI.qty) 
     FROM `tabDelivery Note` DN
     INNER JOIN `tabDelivery Note Item` DI ON DN.name = DI.parent
     WHERE DN.docstatus = 1 
       AND DI.item_code = DCI.item_code
       AND MONTH(DN.posting_date) = 5
       AND DN.customer = DC.customer
       AND DN.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
     GROUP BY DI.item_code) AS "May",
    
    
    (SELECT SUM(DI.qty) 
     FROM `tabDelivery Note` DN
     INNER JOIN `tabDelivery Note Item` DI ON DN.name = DI.parent
     WHERE DN.docstatus = 1 
       AND DI.item_code = DCI.item_code
       AND MONTH(DN.posting_date) = 6
       AND DN.customer = DC.customer
       AND DN.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
     GROUP BY DI.item_code) AS "June",
    
    
    (SELECT SUM(DI.qty) 
     FROM `tabDelivery Note` DN
     INNER JOIN `tabDelivery Note Item` DI ON DN.name = DI.parent
     WHERE DN.docstatus = 1 
       AND DI.item_code = DCI.item_code
       AND MONTH(DN.posting_date) = 7
       AND DN.customer = DC.customer
       AND DN.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
     GROUP BY DI.item_code) AS "July",
    

    (SELECT SUM(DI.qty) 
     FROM `tabDelivery Note` DN
     INNER JOIN `tabDelivery Note Item` DI ON DN.name = DI.parent
     WHERE DN.docstatus = 1 
       AND DI.item_code = DCI.item_code
       AND MONTH(DN.posting_date) = 8
       AND DN.customer = DC.customer
       AND DN.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
     GROUP BY DI.item_code) AS "August",
    
    
    (SELECT SUM(DI.qty) 
     FROM `tabDelivery Note` DN
     INNER JOIN `tabDelivery Note Item` DI ON DN.name = DI.parent
     WHERE DN.docstatus = 1 
       AND DI.item_code = DCI.item_code
       AND MONTH(DN.posting_date) = 9
       AND DN.customer = DC.customer
       AND DN.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
     GROUP BY DI.item_code) AS "September",
    

    (SELECT SUM(DI.qty) 
     FROM `tabDelivery Note` DN
     INNER JOIN `tabDelivery Note Item` DI ON DN.name = DI.parent
     WHERE DN.docstatus = 1 
       AND DI.item_code = DCI.item_code
       AND MONTH(DN.posting_date) = 10
       AND DN.customer = DC.customer
       AND DN.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
     GROUP BY DI.item_code) AS "October",
    
    
    (SELECT SUM(DI.qty) 
     FROM `tabDelivery Note` DN
     INNER JOIN `tabDelivery Note Item` DI ON DN.name = DI.parent
     WHERE DN.docstatus = 1 
       AND DI.item_code = DCI.item_code
       AND MONTH(DN.posting_date) = 11
       AND DN.customer = DC.customer
       AND DN.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
     GROUP BY DI.item_code) AS "November",
    
    
    (SELECT SUM(DI.qty) 
     FROM `tabDelivery Note` DN
     INNER JOIN `tabDelivery Note Item` DI ON DN.name = DI.parent
     WHERE DN.docstatus = 1 
       AND DI.item_code = DCI.item_code
       AND MONTH(DN.posting_date) = 12
       AND DN.customer = DC.customer
       AND DN.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
     GROUP BY DI.item_code) AS "December",
   
    
    (SELECT SUM(DI.qty) 
     FROM `tabDelivery Note` DN
     INNER JOIN `tabDelivery Note Item` DI ON DN.name = DI.parent
     WHERE DN.docstatus = 1 
       AND DI.item_code = DCI.item_code 
       AND DN.customer = DC.customer
       AND DN.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
     GROUP BY DI.item_code) AS "Total Qty",
     sum(DCI.qty *     (SELECT I.last_purchase_rate 
     )) as "Total",
   
    
    (SELECT I.last_purchase_rate 
     FROM `tabItem` I
     WHERE I.name = CASE 
                      WHEN DCI.item_code LIKE '%%-F' THEN REPLACE(DCI.item_code, '-F', '-S')
                      ELSE DCI.item_code 
                    END) AS "Last Purchase Rate ",
    
    
    SUM(DCI.qty * (
        SELECT I.last_purchase_rate 
        FROM `tabItem` I
        WHERE I.name = CASE 
                         WHEN DCI.item_code LIKE '%%-F' THEN REPLACE(DCI.item_code, '-F', '-S')
                         ELSE DCI.item_code 
                       END)) AS "Total Value"

FROM `tabDelivery Note` DC
INNER JOIN `tabDelivery Note Item` DCI ON DC.name = DCI.parent
LEFT OUTER JOIN `tabItem` I ON I.name = DCI.item_code
WHERE DC.docstatus = 1 
  AND DC.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
  AND DC.customer_group LIKE "%%TMS%%" 
  AND DC.customer_group = %(customer_group)s
GROUP BY DCI.item_code, DC.customer;
